finding_results.notes: Testimony now provides explicit operational detail for what happened, when it happened, and with whom (including named third parties and concrete document/public-record actions).
Between reveal and procedural follow-up, Marisol now has multiple embodied reactions plus a memory/self-assessment beat that drives a conscious choice to keep recording before asking who else knows.
Replaced direct moral-summary slogans at key argumentative beats with concrete action/object detail while preserving conflict pressure.
Removed the conflicting standalone Atlantic locator and retained a non-competing death-location reference format.

summary: Chapter 9 now foregrounds causal testimony mechanics and accountable detail, deepens Marisol's destabilization-to-decision arc after the paternity reveal, reduces explicit thesis declaration in cited beats, and resolves the death-location conflict without introducing a new contradiction.
